description: ARI is the sole capital allocation authority. It receives the Candidate Model from the ADE and decides whether, and at what size, to allocate capital. ARI never modifies model signals; it only approves, rejects, or resizes.

inputs.candidate_model: The highest-ranked eligible model from the ADE (Model Evaluation Output)
inputs.ari_state: ARI's own persistent internal state (see state schema below)

consecutive_losses.description: Number of consecutive losses across all models since last win
consecutive_losses.increment_condition: Any losing trade (stop hit) increments by 1

daily_pnl.description: Realised P&L for the current trading day (resets at 18:00 ET)

daily_trade_count.description: Number of trades taken today across all models

active_position.description: True if any model currently has an open position

active_model_id.description: ID of the model currently holding a position (null if none)

drawdown_from_peak.description: Current drawdown from the all-time equity peak (negative number)

risk_multiplier.description: Current risk scaling factor (1.0 = base risk, 0.5 = half risk, 2.0 = double risk)

circuit_breaker_active.description: True if ARI circuit breaker is engaged — no new trades permitted

circuit_breaker_reset_time.description: Time at which circuit breaker automatically resets (if applicable)

R1_active_position_block.reason: One active position per instrument at all times. No new entries until current position is closed.

R2_circuit_breaker.reason: ARI circuit breaker is engaged. No new trades permitted.

R3_daily_loss_limit.reason: Daily loss limit of -$2,000 reached. No new trades today.
R3_daily_loss_limit.prop_firm_variant: For prop firm accounts, limit is -$1,500 (tighter)

R4_consecutive_loss_caution.reason: ARI Caution: 2+ consecutive losses indicate potential regime transition. Pausing until next winning trade.
R4_consecutive_loss_caution.research_basis: Sprint 052 FS-A2-01: consecutive losses are footprints of regime transitions

R6_drawdown_reduction.reason: Drawdown exceeds $5,000 from peak. Risk reduced to 50% until recovery.

R7_profit_compounding.reason: Daily P&L exceeds +$2,000. Risk increased to 125% for remainder of session.

R8_session_end_block.reason: No new entries within 30 minutes of session close (15:30 ET).

capital_allocation.description: Base risk per trade in USD. Actual risk = base_risk * risk_multiplier.

approved_model_id.description: Model ID if approved, null if rejected

contracts.description: Number of contracts to trade (0 if rejected)

actual_risk.description: Actual dollar risk for this trade

rejection_reason.description: Primary rejection reason if not approved

applied_rule.description: ARI rule ID that determined the outcome
